title: A Strange Kingdom in Elbaf
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Zoro, Unknown person #12, Nami, Usopp as The Straw Hats enter an unfamiliar Elbaf setting, encounter giant-scale mysteries, and begin separating the false world around them from the real island.
scene: The Straw Hats enter an unfamiliar Elbaf setting, encounter giant-scale mysteries, and begin separating the false world around them from the real island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It suddenly turned into a lion?! We're doomed!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I sentence you to death for making my beloved cry!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Did it just turn into a cat?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I wonder how this guy will taste.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That rabbit we grilled up earlier sure was tasty!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi sh

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was so scared when usopp died Sanji-kun!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: AND YOU'RE GONNA PAY FOR THAT HUMAN SHELD STUNT...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sounds like there might be even bigger ones around...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If they look good, I'll get us some!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's prioritize finding the sea and our ship...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We need to establish the crew's safety.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you're going after food, don't forget that bee Battalion and their hive!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'd be a shame to waste them since they're so nutritious.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How are you guys taking this place in stride?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: into the unknown!! Cover and color spread upon return!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Where the hell are we anyway?!

summary: This part advances the Arrival in Elbaf through 42 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
